CREATE TABLE weights_table (id UInt32, value Float64, weight UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE input_table (value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
CREATE TABLE mixed_table (value Float64, weight UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
CREATE TABLE subquery_table AS SELECT value, weight FROM mixed_table;
SELECT quantileExactWeighted(0.5)(value, weight) FROM (SELECT value, weight FROM subquery_table) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE another_table (date Date, weight UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY date;
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (CAST('2023-01-01' AS Date), 5), (CAST('2023-01-02' AS Date), 3), (CAST('2023-01-03' AS Date), 7);
CREATE TABLE joined_table (id UInt32, value Float64, weight UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, quantileExactWeighted(0.75)(value, weight) FROM joined_table GROUP BY id;
